name: Workbrain (Infor) Workforce Management API
what_it_does: Workbrain (Infor Workforce Management) REST API for enterprise time and attendance and workforce scheduling. Enables AI agents to manage automated time capture and punch management for hourly workforce payroll data, handle advanced scheduling and shift assignment for retail and manufacturing labor optimization, access rules-based pay calculation for multi-jurisdiction compliance, retrieve workforce analytics and labor cost reporting for operational intelligence, manage absence and leave tracking for HR compliance, handle manager self-service exception handling for supervisory workflow, access employee scheduling preferences and availability for schedule optimization, retrieve labor demand forecasting and scheduling analytics, manage integration with Infor HCM and third-party payroll systems, and access badge reader and time clock integration data for physical time tracking.
use_cases: Managing time and attendance from payroll integration agents
Optimizing retail schedules from labor planning agents
Enforcing pay rules from compliance management agents
Tracking absences from leave management agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise WFM scale
Non-Infor ecosystems without Infor HCM integration advantage
best_when: A large retail, manufacturing, or hospitality company using Workbrain (Infor WFM) wants AI agents to automate time collection, schedule optimization, pay rule enforcement, and labor analytics.
avoid_when: PLATFORM RISK: Workbrain was acquired by Infor (2009); as Infor WFM it is being consolidated with Infor's broader WFM product portfolio — customers may be migrated to other Infor WFM solutions. API documentation for Workbrain-specific functionality is limited; integration may require Infor professional services engagement. Labor law pay rule automation requires employment law review to avoid FLSA and state wage violations.

auth.notes: Workbrain (Infor WFM) uses OAuth 2.0 via Infor OS. No native webhooks. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ (Infor). Workbrain Inc. acquired by Infor (2009). Koch Industries subsidiary. Workbrain strong in retail, manufacturing, and healthcare WFM. Infor WFM encompasses both Workbrain and other Infor workforce products. Competes with UKG, Ceridian Dayforce, and WorkForce Software for enterprise WFM.

pricing.notes: New York. Workbrain acquired by Infor (2009). Koch Industries subsidiary. Enterprise WFM product. Strong in retail and manufacturing. Competes with UKG and Ceridian for enterprise WFM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits via Infor OS platform; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PLATFORM RISK: Workbrain product consolidation within Infor WFM portfolio — migration to other Infor WFM products possible; verify product roadmap commitment before integration
Infor OS identity dependency — Workbrain OAuth flows through Infor OS identity platform; Infor OS configuration issues affect WFM API access
No webhooks — event-driven workforce automation requires polling; no native event notification for punch, schedule, or exception events
Pay rule complexity — Workbrain pay rules encode multi-jurisdiction labor law; automated rule configuration without employment law review creates FLSA and state wage violation risk
Limited public documentation — Workbrain-specific API documentation limited; integration typically requires Infor professional services engagement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise WFM. SOC2. OAuth2/Infor OS. US/EU. Time, scheduling, and labor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: WFM. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Time and labor data.
